use_cases: SaaS landing pages showcasing AI product features with rotating content cards
Productivity platform hero sections with auto-cycling feature highlights
Dashboard-style landing pages that preview analytics and workflow capabilities
AI tool landing pages displaying multi-purpose use cases through animated cards
ai_summary: A dynamic hero component featuring auto-cycling content cards that rotate every 3 seconds with glass morphism navigation and gradient background. Displays multiple card configurations including analytics, projects, and chat history content types. Designed for SaaS and AI product landing pages to showcase platform features through engaging animated visual content.
